title: EPUB to PDF
metaDescription: Convert EPUB e-books to PDF. Preserve formatting, images, and chapter structure.
description:
EPUB to PDF converts electronic book files into high-quality PDF documents. EPUB is the most popular e-book format, used by most e-readers and digital libraries.

This tool preserves text formatting, images, and the chapter structure of your e-books. Perfect for printing, archiving, or sharing e-books in a universally viewable format.

All conversion happens locally in your browser using advanced rendering technology, ensuring your books remain private and the conversion is fast.

howToUse.title: Upload EPUB File
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your .epub file or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Wait for Conversion
howToUse.description: The tool will render and convert all pages of your e-book.

howToUse.title: Download PDF
howToUse.description: Click Download to save your converted PDF document.

useCases.title: Print E-books
useCases.description: Convert e-books to PDF for physical printing.

useCases.title: Archive Books
useCases.description: Store e-books in long-term stable PDF format.

useCases.title: Share Documents
useCases.description: Share e-books with anyone, even without an e-reader.

faq.question: Is the formatting preserved?
faq.answer: Yes! This tool uses native EPUB rendering, preserving text formatting, images, and layout with high fidelity.

faq.question: Are DRM-protected EPUBs supported?
faq.answer: No, DRM-protected e-books cannot be converted. Only DRM-free EPUB files are supported.

faq.question: How is page size determined?
faq.answer: EPUB content is rendered to standard A4 page size for optimal readability.
